title: Gleam stdlib wrappers — second wave and sample workflow e2e
purpose: The gleam_stdlib module contains 29 Erlang FFI wrapper functions that Gleam's standard library delegates to. With B-037 through B-039 dependencies in place, implementing these wrappers unblocks the sample_workflow:run/1 end-to-end test — the milestone that proves beamr can execute a real Gleam workflow.
task: Implement 29 gleam_stdlib BIFs, 2 uri_string stubs, and un-ignore the sample_workflow_e2e test to verify end-to-end execution.
boundaries: SHALL NOT implement full RFC 3986 URI parsing — stub uri_string:parse/1 with approximate splitting
SHALL NOT implement full Erlang format string parsing — gleam_stdlib:float_to_string uses basic f64 formatting
SHALL stub uri_string functions as approximations, noted in boundaries
SHALL mark approximate stubs with inline notes for future replacement

requirements.title: gleam_stdlib data conversion wrappers (10 functions)
requirements.spec: Register under gleam_stdlib: classify_dynamic/1, dict/1, float/1, float_to_string/1, index/2, int/1, int_from_base_string/2, parse_float/1, parse_int/1, wrap_list/1.

requirements.title: gleam_stdlib encoding and binary wrappers (8 functions)
requirements.spec: Register: base16_decode/1, base16_encode/1, base64_decode/1, base64_encode/2, bit_array_concat/1, bit_array_pad_to_bytes/1, bit_array_slice/3, bit_array_to_int_and_size/1.

requirements.title: gleam_stdlib I/O and utility wrappers (7 functions)
requirements.spec: Register: is_null/1, list/5, map_get/2, print/1, print_error/1, println/1, println_error/1.

requirements.title: URI wrappers + uri_string stubs (6 functions)
requirements.spec: Register gleam_stdlib: parse_query/1, percent_decode/1, percent_encode/1, uri_parse/1. Register uri_string: parse/1, dissect_query/1. URI stubs are approximate (not full RFC 3986).
acceptance: uri_string:parse(<<"https://example.com/path?q=1">>) returns map with scheme, host, path, query

requirements.title: sample_workflow e2e test — un-ignore and verify
requirements.spec: Remove #[ignore] from sample_workflow_run_completes_end_to_end. Verify the test passes with all stdlib BIFs implemented.
acceptance: Test loads all .beam files from test-workflows/sample/
All modules load with zero or warn-only unresolved imports
Return value is a well-formed tuple
